scripts.copy-json: mkdir -p target/appeal/json && mkdir -p target/appeal/xlsx && cp definitions/appeal/json/*.json target/appeal/json/ && cp definitions/appeal/env/${CCD_ENV:-dev}/*.json target/appeal/json/
scripts.setup: git submodule update --init --recursive && yarn --cwd ccd-definition-processor install
scripts.generate-json: yarn --cwd ccd-definition-processor xlsx2json -D ../definitions/appeal/json -i ../definitions/appeal/xlsx/ccd-appeal-config-base.xlsx && pretty-quick --pattern 'appeal/**/json/**.json' && sed -e 's+http://ia-case-api:8090+${CCD_DEF_IA_URL}+g' ./definitions/appeal/json/CaseEvent.json  > ./definitions/appeal/json/CaseEvent.json.new && mv ./definitions/appeal/json/CaseEvent.json.new ./definitions/appeal/json/CaseEvent.json && mv definitions/appeal/json/UserProfile.json definitions/appeal/env/${CCD_ENV:-dev}/UserProfile.json
scripts.generate-dev: CCD_ENV=dev yarn copy-json && CCD_DEF_VERSION=`git branch | grep '* '` CCD_ENV=dev CCD_DEF_IA_URL=${IA_CASE_URL:-$npm_package_config_dev_iaCaseUrl} yarn generate-excel
scripts.generate-demo: CCD_ENV=demo yarn copy-json && CCD_DEF_VERSION=`git branch | grep '* '` CCD_ENV=demo CCD_DEF_IA_URL=$npm_package_config_demo_iaCaseUrl yarn generate-excel
scripts.generate-aat: CCD_ENV=aat yarn copy-json && CCD_DEF_VERSION=`git branch | grep '* '` CCD_ENV=aat CCD_DEF_IA_URL=$npm_package_config_aat_iaCaseUrl yarn generate-excel
scripts.generate-prod: CCD_ENV=prod yarn copy-json && yarn decrypt && CCD_DEF_VERSION='' CCD_ENV=prod CCD_DEF_IA_URL=$npm_package_config_prod_iaCaseUrl yarn generate-excel
scripts.generate-all: yarn generate-dev && yarn generate-demo && yarn generate-aat && yarn generate-prod
scripts.upload: yarn generate-dev && USER_TOKEN=$(${CCD_DOCKER_PATH}/bin/idam-user-token.sh) && SERVICE_TOKEN=$(${CCD_DOCKER_PATH}/bin/idam-service-token.sh) && curl http://127.0.0.1:4451/import -H "Authorization: Bearer ${USER_TOKEN}" -H "ServiceAuthorization: Bearer ${SERVICE_TOKEN}" -F file="@target/appeal/xlsx/ccd-appeal-config-dev.xlsx" && echo ''
